sentences.target: Je termine mon inscription en ligne.

translations.fr: Je termine mon inscription en ligne.
translations.es: Estoy terminando mi inscripción en línea.
translations.it: Sto completando la mia iscrizione online.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在完成我的在线注册。
translations.yue: 我正喺網上完成我嘅報名。
translations.he: אני מסיים את ההרשמה שלי באינטרנט.
translations.vi: Tôi đang hoàn tất đăng ký trực tuyến của mình.
translations.nl: Ik rond mijn online inschrijving af.
translations.hi: मैं अपना ऑनलाइन पंजीकरण पूरा कर रहा हूँ।
translations.nb: Jeg fullfører registreringen min på nettet.
translations.id: Saya sedang menyelesaikan pendaftaran saya secara online.
translations.ja: オンラインで登録の手続きを進めています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject clitic pronoun.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; masculine singular form used before a vowel-initial noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of the verb.
Preposition introducing 'ligne' in the fixed expression 'en ligne' (online).
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'en' in the adverbial expression 'en ligne'.

sentences.target: L'inscription à la salle est ouverte.

translations.fr: L'inscription à la salle est ouverte.
translations.es: Las inscripciones del gimnasio están abiertas.
translations.de: Die Anmeldung fürs Fitnessstudio ist offen.
translations.it: Le iscrizioni in palestra sono aperte.
translations.pt: As inscrições para a academia estão abertas.
translations.vi: Đăng ký phòng gym đã mở.
translations.nl: De inschrijving voor de sportschool is geopend.
translations.el: Οι εγγραφές στο γυμναστήριο είναι ανοικτές.
translations.ja: ジムの登録は受付中です。

tokens.explanation: Noun with elided definite article (l' for le), feminine singular; subject of the copular clause.
Preposition introducing the complement 'la salle'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiners the noun 'salle'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'à'.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links subject to predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective (past participle used adjectivally), feminine singular agreeing with 'inscription'.

sentences.target: On vérifie ton inscription au concours.

translations.fr: On vérifie ton inscription au concours.
translations.en: We're checking your registration for the contest.
translations.es: Estamos verificando tu inscripción al concurso.
translations.de: Wir prüfen deine Anmeldung für den Wettbewerb.
translations.it: Stiamo verificando la tua iscrizione al concorso.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在核实你参加比赛的报名。
translations.yue: 我哋正喺度核實你嘅比賽報名。
translations.ru: Мы проверяем твою регистрацию на конкурс.
translations.pt: Estamos verificando sua inscrição no concurso.
translations.he: אנחנו בודקים את ההרשמה שלך לתחרות.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang kiểm tra đăng ký dự thi của bạn.
translations.ar: نحن نتحقق من تسجيلك في المسابقة.
translations.nl: We controleren je inschrijving voor de wedstrijd.
translations.uk: Ми перевіряємо твою реєстрацію на конкурс.
translations.hi: हम तुम्हारी प्रतियोगिता के लिए पंजीकरण की जाँच कर रहे हैं।
translations.el: Ελέγχουμε την εγγραφή σου στον διαγωνισμό.
translations.nb: Vi sjekker påmeldingen din til konkurransen.
translations.id: Kami sedang memeriksa pendaftaranmu untuk lomba.
translations.sv: Vi kontrollerar din anmälan till tävlingen.
translations.da: Vi tjekker din tilmelding til konkurrencen.
translations.ja: コンテストの参加登録を確認しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular (often colloquial 'we').
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular; masculine singular form used before a vowel-initial noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of the verb.
Contraction of preposition 'à' and definite article 'le'; introduces the complement 'concours'.
Common noun, masculine (invariable in number); object of the preposition 'au'.

sentences.target: Tu dois confirmer l'inscription avant vendredi.

translations.fr: Tu dois confirmer l'inscription avant vendredi.
translations.en: You need to confirm the registration before Friday.
translations.es: Tienes que confirmar la inscripción antes del viernes.
translations.de: Du musst die Anmeldung bis Freitag bestätigen.
translations.zh-Hans: 你需要在星期五之前确认报名。
translations.yue: 你要喺星期五之前確認報名。
translations.ru: Тебе нужно подтвердить регистрацию до пятницы.
translations.pt: Você precisa confirmar a inscrição antes de sexta-feira.
translations.he: עליך לאשר את ההרשמה לפני יום שישי.
translations.tr: Cuma gününden önce kaydı onaylaman gerekiyor.
translations.vi: Bạn cần xác nhận đăng ký trước thứ Sáu.
translations.ar: يجب أن تؤكد التسجيل قبل يوم الجمعة.
translations.nl: Je moet de inschrijving vóór vrijdag bevestigen.
translations.uk: Тобі потрібно підтвердити реєстрацію до п'ятниці.
translations.hu: Péntek előtt meg kell erősítened a regisztrációt.
translations.hi: तुम्हें शुक्रवार से पहले पंजीकरण की पुष्टि करनी है।
translations.el: Πρέπει να επιβεβαιώσεις την εγγραφή πριν από την Παρασκευή.
translations.nb: Du må bekrefte påmeldingen før fredag.
translations.id: Kamu perlu mengonfirmasi pendaftaran sebelum hari Jumat.
translations.sv: Du behöver bekräfta anmälan före fredag.
translations.ro: Trebuie să confirmi înscrierea înainte de vineri.
translations.da: Du skal bekræfte tilmeldingen inden fredag.
translations.fi: Sinun pitää vahvistaa ilmoittautuminen ennen perjantaita.
translations.ja: 金曜日までに登録を確認する必要があります。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun.
Modal verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; selects an infinitive complement.
Infinitive verb; complement of the modal 'devoir'.
Noun with elided definite article (l' for le), feminine singular; direct object of 'confirmer'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Common noun denoting a day of the week; object of the preposition 'avant'.

Tu dois confirmer l'inscription avant vendredi.

You need to confirm the registration before Friday.
